    have h₃ : (θ : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioc 0 (2 * π) := by simpa using θ
    have z₁ : meromorphicOrderAt (fun x : ℝ ↦ (f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 θ : ℂ)) 0 < 0 := by
      have z₂ : meromorphicOrderAt (fun x : ℝ ↦ (f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 θ : ℂ)) 0 < 0 := by
        have z₃ : meromorphicOrderAt (fun x : ℝ ↦ (f (circleMap 0 r x) : ℂ)) 0 < 0 := by
          have z₄ : meromorphicOrderAt f 0 < 0 := by
            sorry
          sorry
        have z₄ : meromorphicOrderAt (fun x : ℝ ↦ (circleMap 0 1 θ : ℂ)) 0 ≥ 0 := by
          sorry
        have z₅ : meromorphicOrderAt (fun x : ℝ ↦ (f (circleMap 0 r x) - circleMap 0 1 θ : ℂ)) 0 < 0 := by
          sorry
        exact z₅
      exact z₂
    sorry
